reason: This video is educational content for French as a Second Language (FSL) instruction, not a Fundamentals of Laparoscopic Surgery (FLS) task. The content features animated characters teaching French grammar and language concepts, includes resource portals for FSL curricula, and contains no laparoscopic instruments, surgical simulation equipment, or any FLS task elements.
note: No scoring performed. This submission is not within the scope of FLS task evaluation.
